texto: Over the course of my career, I have come to accept that some of my more provocative work courts controversy, and as an artist, I value the discourse that arises from this. I can only hope for this discourse to be informed by fact, so that whether you love my work or hate it, you give it, and me, the benefit of the truth.
explicacao: Citação de Terry Richardson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Over the course of my career, I have come to accept that some of my more provocative work courts …” articula trabalho, love, work em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e work.
